prompts.name: trens_livre
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Urban railway tracks at sunrise in São Paulo, Brazil
The first light of dawn illuminates the industrial heritage of an urban landscape as it meets the raw aesthetics of railway tracks, casting long, dramatic shadows over rusted rails and graffiti-covered carriages. The city skyline looms behind, a testament to modern architecture, with towering skyscrapers silhouetted against the vibrant hues of sunrise. A train roars through the frame, its motion blurred by the early morning light, adding an element of movement and dynamism to the otherwise static scene. Urban explorers can be seen scouring the tracks for hidden gems amidst the grit and decay, their torches casting pools of light on the textured ground. The atmosphere is one of contrast - the beauty of the sunrise juxtaposed with the harshness of the industrial setting, creating a landscape that is both inviting and foreboding. Compositionally, the train serves as the central focus, leading the eye through the frame from the depths of the railway to the towering cityscape beyond.
Canon EOS R5, 24-70mm f/2.8, f/8, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: trens_livre_2
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Tunnel with steamy windows, an industrial heritage site nestled within a modern metropolis. The dimly lit, sprawling tunnel network showcases the raw power and resilience of railway aesthetics, as vintage steam locomotives contrast with sleek modern trains. The atmosphere is electrifying yet eerie, punctuated by flickering neon lights and glowing orange embers from the steam engines.

The walls are lined with rough concrete textures, adorned with graffiti art that adds a vibrant pop of color amidst the grimy industrial setting. Concrete pillars supporting the ceiling create an intricate web, providing a composition rich in lines and shapes that lead the eye towards the train emerging from the darkness at the end of the tunnel.

The light quality is a blend of soft ambient glow emanating from the cityscape beyond the tunnel entrance and harsh spotlights illuminating the industrial machinery within the tunnel. The steamy windows create a veil of mystery, gradually revealing the chaotic beauty unfolding inside as the train approaches.

Night cityscapes can be glimpsed through the windows, their vibrant lights providing an intriguing contrast to the dark and gritty industrial landscape. Urban exploration enthusiasts scurry around the tracks, capturing fleeting moments of motion and movement that add a dynamic energy to the scene. The juxtaposition between the old and new, the raw and refined, the decaying and thriving, creates an engineering marvel that encapsulates the essence of transportation in a city that never sleeps.

Sony A7R V, 24mm f/1.4, f/2, ISO 3200, ultra realistic, National Geographic

prompts.name: trens_livre_3
prompts.text:
RAW photo, professional photography
Modern subway system interior at night - the dimly lit, sleek corridors of a futuristic metro station in Tokyo. The glossy black tiles reflecting the soft glow of neon signs and the distant hum of city life. A train rushes through the tunnel, its bright headlights cutting through the darkness, casting an ethereal light that illuminates the industrial textures of rusted metal beams and worn concrete walls. The station's urban landscape is juxtaposed with the clean lines and advanced engineering of the train cars. A blur of motion captures the dynamic energy of transportation, while the city skyline outside the windows offers a glimpse into the pulsing heart of the metropolis.

RAW photo, professional photography
Canon EOS R5, 24-70mm f/2.8, f/8, ISO 100, ultra realistic, National Geographic
